def run_attack(
    model: nn.Module,
    images: torch.Tensor,
    labels: torch.Tensor,
    eps: float,
    device: torch.device,
    n_classes: int,
) -> torch.Tensor:
    import os
    import torchattacks

    _ = device
    model.eval()
    attack = torchattacks.AutoAttack(
        model,
        norm="Linf",
        eps=eps,
        version="standard",
        n_classes=n_classes,
        seed=int(os.environ.get("SEED", "42")),
        verbose=False,
    )
    return attack(images, labels)
